name: Oatmeal Applesauce Squares
recipeIngredient: 1 cup rolled oats (not instant or old fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 13 x 9 inches pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine cake mix, egg whites, and margarine. Mix until well blended.
4. Spread mixture in prepared pan.
5. Bake for 15 minutes.
6. Pour applesauce over hot baked layer.
7. In a small bowl, combine oats and brown sugar. Mix until crumbly.
8. Sprinkle the oat and brown sugar mixture over the applesauce.
9. Return to oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes or until lightly browned.
